title: ExecutableFSM
description: Canonical representation of an executable finite-state machine for FSMReasonBench v1.

fsm_id.description: Stable identifier for this FSM within the benchmark item.

fsm_type.description: Automaton type; determines transition semantics and acceptance.

states.description: Finite set of state identifiers Q.

initial_state.description: Initial state q0; must be an element of states.

accepting_states.description: Accepting states F (DFA/NFA). Optional for Mealy if acceptance is property-specific.

transitions.description: Transition relation delta. Multiple entries per (state, symbol) allowed for NFA.

metadata.description: Optional generator metadata; not required for verification.

to.description: Target state (NFA: one of possibly many successors).

output.description: Mealy output emitted on this transition.
